title: Head first into Claude: Anthropic bets big on India
content: India has joined an elite group of nations gaining access to Anthropic's advanced AI cybersecurity model, Mythos, through Project Glasswing. This initiative aims to preempt cyber threats by identifying software vulnerabilities. India's inclusion, alongside key allies, highlights its growing significance in global AI development and its extensive digital infrastructure, offering mutual benefits in the race for cyber defense.

title: Delhi hotel fire: After hours on the run, owner Lavkesh Bajaj detained
content: Owner Lavkesh Bajaj has been detained in connection with a Malviya Nagar hotel fire that killed 21 people. The hotel operated at nearly four times its permitted capacity, lacked fire safety clearance, and had unauthorized additional floors.  Authorities issued a lookout circular and conducted raids to prevent the accused from fleeing.

title: Iran targets US military vessel's 'command center' in Gulf of Oman, Centcom dismisses claim
content: Iran's state media reported its navy targeted a US destroyer in the Gulf of Oman, citing US actions against Iranian commercial vessels. The US Central Command refuted the claim, stating its military assets at sea are operating safely and unimpeded.

title: After 8,000 layoffs, Meta tells 7,000 employees: You can make the real impact on this team
content: Meta is making big changes. Thousands of employees are moving to new AI teams. This is part of a major company-wide AI focus. CEO Mark Zuckerberg wants to strengthen Meta's AI position. Some workers are calling it an 'AI draft'. The company is also developing new AI tools. This restructuring shows Meta's growing commitment to artificial intelligence.

title: On Indo-China border, model village to come up in Ladakh for nomads
content: Ladakh's first model border village is being established at Chumur, a remote settlement at 16,700 feet along the India-China border. This initiative under the Vibrant Village Program will provide climate-resilient housing, enhance livelihoods through goat rearing and greenhouse cultivation, and integrate essential services to foster secure, permanent settlements and strengthen civil-defence cooperation.

title: Google plans to release 32 million Wolbachia-infected mosquitoes across Florida and California
content: Alphabet's Debug initiative is seeking EPA approval to release 32 million specially treated male mosquitoes in California and Florida. This innovative approach uses Wolbachia bacteria to sterilize wild Culex mosquitoes, aiming to significantly reduce the spread of diseases like West Nile virus. Advanced AI and robotics are enabling this large-scale effort, with trials planned over two years.

title: From TMC insider to rebel leader: Who is Ritabrata Banerjee, man at the centre of turmoil
content: Expelled TMC leader Ritabrata Banerjee claims Speaker recognized him as opposition leader, signaling a major internal crisis. Fifty-eight rebel MLAs support this move, proposing a new leadership structure. This revolt, the party's biggest challenge, follows a significant election defeat and has prompted a TMC organizational overhaul.

title: Doctor reveals 4 health markers that may predict heart attack and stroke risk
content: Doctors are now suggesting looking beyond just LDL cholesterol for heart health. New markers like ApoB, hs-CRP, insulin resistance, and abdominal obesity provide a better and fuller picture. These factors reveal how inflammation, metabolism, and body fat impact vascular health. Understanding these elements helps identify risks earlier for better prevention.

title: Delhi fire tragedy: What India's fire safety rules actually require
content: A devastating hotel fire in Delhi claimed 21 lives, highlighting India's lax fire safety adherence. The National Building Code mandates stringent measures for building design, materials, and escape routes, especially for high-rises.  Strict enforcement and regular drills are crucial to prevent future tragedies, as the code's effectiveness hinges on implementation.

title: US reaches EB-2 visa limit for Indians; new visas resume in October
content: Indian applicants for the EB-2 visa category will face a temporary halt as the US has exhausted its FY2026 quota. Embassies can no longer issue these visas until October 1, 2026, when the new fiscal year begins and limits reset. This impacts those seeking permanent residency through advanced degrees or exceptional abilities.

title: IRCTC flags 9 crore user accounts, expands AI monitoring across railway kitchens
content: IRCTC has taken decisive action against ticket booking fraud, deactivating over three crore suspicious user IDs and verifying six crore more. Simultaneously, an AI-powered kitchen monitoring system, utilizing 2,394 cameras, now oversees 800 kitchens, detecting nine types of hygiene issues to ensure food quality for millions of passengers.

title: ED summons TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee in teacher recruitment scam; asked to appear on June 15
content: Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee has been summoned by the Enforcement Directorate to appear on June 15. The agency is investigating alleged irregularities and money laundering in the recruitment of primary teachers in West Bengal. Banerjee is expected to join the ongoing probe into the scam.

title: Planning to get your first loan or credit card? How lenders evaluate new-to-credit customers
content: Not having any credit accounts is a big disadvantage when looking to access new credit. But what can help is your existing relationship with banks, particularly those that hold your salary or savings account.

title: Maria Sharapova steals spotlight with stunning French Open return
content: Maria Sharapova made a surprise appearance at the 2025 French Open, delighting fans at Roland Garros. The five-time Grand Slam champion and two-time French Open winner posed for photos, met former star Gustavo Kuerten, and received praise across social media. Though retired since 2020, Sharapova remains one of tennis’ most popular figures and continues to attract worldwide attention.

title: Bruins urged to avoid Kiefer Sherwood trade amid Canucks rumors
content: The Boston Bruins have been rumoured in NHL trade speculation regarding Vancouver Canucks forward Kiefer Sherwood. His offensive production has increased his value around the league, but the potential acquisition cost could make the move difficult to justify. With the NHL trade deadline looming, Boston Bruins general manager Don Sweeney has a big decision to make on the team’s future assets.

title: Maple Leafs eye star forward amid Islanders trade speculation
content: Trade speculation surrounding New York Islanders forward Mathew Barzal has given the Toronto Maple Leafs a new lease of life, and reports have suggested the Islanders could be looking to shake up their roster, and that has led to questions about whether Toronto could pursue the talented center as they look to improve their lineup ahead of the 2026-27 NHL season.

title: 'Players like Jofra might not play for England if ... ': Stokes reacts to IPL criticism
content: England captain Ben Stokes has defended Jofra Archer after criticism over the fast bowler missing the first Test against New Zealand following his IPL stint with Rajasthan Royals. Stokes said modern cricket offers players more opportunities than before and insisted Archer remains committed to England. He also warned that mishandling such situations could risk losing talented players from international cricket.

title: Former NFL scout sparks outrage with claim amid Russini-Vrabel scandal
content: Severe allegations have surfaced regarding female journalists and NFL coaches. A former NFL scout suggests ten current female reporters have engaged/are engaging in relationships with NFL coaches, executives, agents, or players. This follows the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel’s Sedona cheating scandal. Crissy Froyd, a journalist, was fired from USA TODAY after commenting on Dianna Russini’s resignation from The Athletic. She believes some reporters trade relationships for stories. And they are corrupting the industry she has known since she was 15.

title: Who is Atiqa Mir? 11-year-old racing star creates history in Greece
content: Eleven-year-old Atiqa Mir achieved a career-defining victory in Greece, dominating the Champions of the Future Academy Program. She became only the third driver in the series' history to achieve a clean sweep of qualifying, heats, and finals, culminating in an emotional moment as India's national anthem played.

title: Free student bus passes, job exchange, youth clubs: DKS announces first set of decisions as CM
content: Karnataka's new Chief Minister DK Shivakumar has launched significant welfare and youth-focused initiatives. These include free bus passes for students from school to postgraduate levels and the establishment of 10,000 youth clubs with Rs 10 lakh each for sports, culture, and leadership. A private employment exchange will also be set up to aid job seekers.

title: 'Punjab focused more on...': Sachin Tendulkar explains PBKS' downfall
content: Punjab Kings experienced a dramatic IPL 2026 collapse, losing six straight after a perfect start. Despite a strong coaching team, they missed playoffs. Sachin Tendulkar attributed Punjab's downfall to a shift from process to results. He also lauded Gujarat Titans' consistent performance, highlighting their ability to manage volatility throughout the season.

title: Yamal injury: Spain coach gives major update ahead of FIFA World Cup
content: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente is optimistic that Lamine Yamal will be fit for the team's World Cup opener against Cape Verde on June 15 despite a hamstring injury suffered in April. Yamal will miss the warm-up match against Iraq, while Nico Williams and Víctor Muñoz are also sidelined. Spain are aiming to improve on recent World Cup performances.

title: Delhi's Malviya Nagar fire: Can the owner be charged with culpable homicide?
content: A devastating fire at a Malviya Nagar B&B, claiming 21 lives, is prompting a criminal probe. The establishment, operating far beyond its permitted capacity and without a fire NOC, mirrors the 2022 Mundka fire. Authorities are investigating culpable homicide charges against the absconding owner, highlighting systemic failures in regulatory oversight.

title: No way out: Sealed windows, sensor gates turned Delhi hotel into death trap during fire
content: A devastating fire at a Malviya Nagar hotel, reportedly operating with 25 rooms despite a six-room license, claimed 21 lives. Sealed windows and malfunctioning sensor gates hampered escape, with preliminary findings suggesting the blaze originated near the ground floor staircase. The building also lacked a fire No Objection Certificate.

title: ‘I was a little bit perturbed’: Trump confirms calling Netanyahu 'crazy'
content: US President Donald Trump admitted calling Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu "f***ing crazy" due to frustration over Lebanon escalation, impacting Iran talks. Despite the heated exchange, Trump insists their strong working relationship continues, citing shared "wartime leader" pressures. He remains optimistic about resolving regional tensions soon.

title: Jaishankar condoles Delhi hotel fire deaths, says MEA assisting foreign victims
content: A devastating fire in South Delhi's Malviya Nagar hotel claimed at least 21 lives, including foreign nationals from countries like Bangladesh and Nigeria. The External Affairs Minister expressed condolences and assured assistance to embassies. Investigations reveal the establishment may have operated with more rooms than permitted, raising serious questions about safety and emergency response.

title: Pooja Bedi on Shilpa Shinde's admisson of 'false' sexual harassment case agains producer
content: Pooja Bedi has strongly reacted to Shilpa Shinde admitting that the sexual harassment case she had filed against Bhabiji Ghar Par Hain producer Sanjay Kohli was false. Shilpa made the revelation during a recent conversation with Bharti Singh and Haarsh Limbachiyaa on their podcast, reigniting discussions around the misuse of laws meant to protect victims of harassment.

title: 'I'm baffled': Ex-England batter on Archer's absence after full IPL stint
content: Former England batter Mark Butcher expressed bewilderment over Jofra Archer's exclusion from the first Test against New Zealand, despite a stellar IPL season. Butcher questioned the decision, highlighting Archer's value as a premier fast bowler and the limited home Test schedule. He also pondered Ben Stokes' move to bat at number seven.

title: Major upset! World No. 1 Sabalenka crashes out of French Open after QF loss
content: World No. 1 Aryna Sabalenka suffered a stunning French Open quarterfinal defeat, blowing a set lead and a 4-1 advantage in the second set before losing to Diana Shnaider. Meanwhile, unseeded Polish player Maja Chwalinska continued her dream run, defeating Anna Kalinskaya to reach the semifinals after coming through qualifying and exceeding all expectations.

title: Why TMC revolt is about Abhishek Banerjee, not Mamata
content: A Trinamool Congress rebellion is deepening, with expelled leader Ritabrata Banerjee challenging Abhishek Banerjee's authority rather than Mamata Banerjee's leadership. This internal strife, fueled by disputes over decision-making and the leader of opposition appointment, signals a proxy battle over succession, echoing past regional party struggles. The focus is on Abhishek's growing influence and organizational control.

title: India's ‘Sudarshan Chakra’ gets more powerful: Fourth S-400 squadron arrives from Russia
content: India has received its fourth S-400 air defence squadron from Russia, significantly bolstering its long-range aerial defence. This delivery, part of a larger 2018 deal, follows earlier squadrons and is set for rapid deployment. The system has proven effective, notably during Operation Sindoor, and is integrating into India's broader 'Sudarshan Chakra' air defence network alongside indigenous projects like Kusha.

title: 'Peddi' review': Will Ram Charan deliver another blockbusters after 'RRR'?
content: Ram Charan's highly anticipated rural sports drama 'Peddi' has released worldwide, aiming to be a massive blockbuster after 'RRR'. The film, featuring Janhvi Kapoor and a stellar cast, boasts impressive pre-release business and a pan-India release strategy. With a significant breakeven target and Netflix securing OTT rights, 'Peddi' carries immense expectations for box office success.

title: Cowboys, Eagles linked to Raiders’ $106.5 million star after failed trade
content: The Las Vegas Raiders’ star player Maxx Crosby was nearly traded to the Baltimore Ravens in March 2026 before he failed in his physical, sparking chaos and panic among millions of fans. Amid this, the Dallas Cowboys and the Philadelphia Eagles seems to have emerged as potential landing spots for Maxx Crosby ahead of the new season amid strong rumors.

title: Country over IPL? Pat Cummins leaves 2027 participation in doubt
content: Australian captain Pat Cummins is considering skipping IPL 2027 due to a demanding international schedule.  With major tours and tournaments ahead, he indicated that franchise cricket might be sacrificed to prioritize national duties.  Cummins emphasized Test matches and the ODI World Cup as his primary focus, suggesting workload management for the pace attack is crucial.

title: License for 6 rooms, running 25: Shocking details emerge in Delhi hotel fire that killed 21
content: A devastating fire in Delhi's Malviya Nagar claimed 21 lives, including foreign nationals, in a hotel allegedly operating with more rooms than permitted. Political parties have slammed the fire department's delayed response, citing negligence. Eight injured victims remain critical with smoke inhalation, while others sustained fractures escaping the blaze.

title: ‘Imagine that pressure at 15’: Buttler on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi fever
content: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, just 15, has been hailed as the IPL 2026's true star, even surpassing RCB's title win.  Jos Buttler and Stuart Broad lauded his record-breaking 776 runs at a blistering strike rate.  His immense popularity in India and global recognition are unprecedented for a player yet to debut internationally.

title: Remove restrictions on visitors to Secretariat: CPI(M)
content: A lot of restrictions are already in place. The new measures will prevent people from approaching the government machinery, says P. Shanmugam, State Secretary of the CPI(M), in a post on social media

title: Loyalists rally behind Mamata, say an ousted leader cannot lead Trinamool in Assembly
content: Earlier in the day, the Trinamool had dissolved all its party committees, including district and block units; party leaders say ‘Mamata is the original Trinamool Congress’

title: 36 arrests in a day as Kochi City police launch ‘Operation Toofan’
content: Kochi City police registered 33 NDPS cases during raids across 90 locations as part of the Statewide anti-narcotics drive. Seven COTPA cases booked

title: ‘Assault’ on women: lookout notice to be issued against main accused
content: The main accused and six others are on the run, while the three arrested have been remanded in judicial custody

title: Thousands of teachers likely to lose jobs in Calicut varsity’s self-financing colleges
content: The Vice-Chancellor’s office is learnt to have issued orders to enforce UGC guidelines in their appointment. Clearance of UGC-NET or PhD is mandatory to become faculty members

title: An app to help eateries sell surplus food
content: The Kozhikode Corporation backs the initiative, citing its potential to divert food from landfills and reduce methane emissions

title: Unregulated quarrying upsets upland residents in Kozhikode
content: Residents allege quarrying and transportation of mined rock continue unabated despite repeated representations to local administrators and various government departments

title: Amid broken ties, Rahul, Kharge hail Karunanidhi on his birth anniversary
content: Move being seen as attempts to assuage DMK leadership, which is reportedly upset over the Congress’ tie-up with actor-turned politician Vijay-led Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam

title: Info panel rejects claim that CCTV footage in police station got auto-deleted
content: Says not preserving the data citing space constraints defeats the purpose of installing CCTV in police stations

title: U.S. proposes 12.5% tariff on India and other countries, Indian govt says it ‘remains engaged’ with U.S.
content: The action follows investigations launched against 60 countries over what the USTR described as their failure to impose and effectively enforce bans on imports made with forced labour

title: Karnataka CM swearing-in highlights: D.K. Shivakumar announces sops for "Yuva Yuga" in maiden briefing as chief minister
content: Earlier in the day, the 64-year-old Congress leader took oath in the name of late seer Gangadhar Ajjayya.

title: Gujarat cabinet approves ‘wire-free city mission’; ₹500 crore allocated for first phase
content: Under the mission, all 17 municipal corporations and 151 municipalities in Gujarat will be covered in a phased manner.

title: Class VIII student dies after house roof collapses in Vellore
content: Parents and neighbours rushed the boy to Government Taluk Hospital in Gudiyatham where he succumbed to injuries

title: Residents welcome closure of Tasmac outlet in Tiruvannamalai
content: Residents celebrated the closure of the outlet, which they said caused public nuisance, by distributing sweets to neighbours and motorists

title: District administrations gear up for reopening of schools in Vellore, nearby districts
content: Many schools were given a facelift, like removal of bushes, erection of steel fences around the campus, replacing old electrical lines and water pipelines with new ones

title: TheraNym Biologics opens ₹1,200 crore manufacturing facility near Hyderabad
content: Telangana Industries Minister D. Sridhar Babu inaugurates the new facility of the Aurobindo Pharma subsidiary that is expected to generate job opportunities for more than 1,500 local youth

title: Russia delivers fourth squadron of AI-enabled S-400 air defence system
content: Three S-400 squadrons have already been inducted into service; the fourth has now arrived, following delays linked to the Russia-Ukraine conflict

title: Calls for bringing Attakulangara school campus alive
content: Improving the school’s standards and bringing its vast campus alive with children from the neighbourhood in the evenings and weekends are some of the suggestions to prevent further neglect

title: Explained | How D.K. Shivakumar finally became Karnataka’s Chief Minister
content: For decades, D. K. Shivakumar answered questions about becoming Chief Minister with a simple line: “Efforts may fail, but prayers do not.” Now, after a political journey spanning nearly four decades, he has finally reached Karnataka’s highest office.

title: Delhi hotel fire: Locals turn saviours amid wails, screams, burning bodies
content: Rescuers say building’s single entry-exit point and lack of accessible windows made the rescue operation difficult

title: Nepal is a priority partner, says Modi after meeting RSP chief
content: By focusing on shared civilizational bonds, digital corridors, and seamless connectivity, we can truly build a partnership defined by progress and mutual trust, says Rabi Lamichanne

title: Congress asks why PM protects Pradhan despite Education Ministry’s ‘incompetence and corruption’
content: The transfer of the CBSE’s top leadership has failed to address the issue of accountability at the highest levels of the Education Ministry, Congress general secretary Jairam Ramesh says

title: Trinamool leader Jay Prakash Majumdar arrested for illegally occupying a house over year
content: Jay Prakash Majumdar, the state vice president of Trinamool Congress, joined the party in 2022 after he was suspended from BJP for publicly criticising the party for their defeat in 2021 assembly election.

title: Three arrested for attack on ‘Khan Sir’s’ coaching institute in Patna
content: Bihar Education Minister Mithilesh Tiwari says State government would formulate a policy within next three months to prevent rivalry among coaching institutes from disturbing law and order

title: Census fieldwork contradicts government data, enumerators asked to revisit, review data
content: Director Census Operations (DCO), Rajasthan, writes to all district functionaries that ‘during the analysis of field data collected so far, some discrepancies have been noticed’;  enumerators allege they have been asked not to ‘select options that may show the government in poor light’

title: West Bengal govt. downgrades Sourav Ganguly’s security cover
content: It’s part of an ‘ongoing routine exercise’ in reviewing security cover for prominent personalities based on threat assessments, officials say

title: Cockroach Janta Party zeroes in on Pradhan resignation demand, sets protest for June 6
content: CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke will come from the U.S. to seek permission for Jantar Mantar protest; CJP calls on people across the political spectrum to join protest without party or organisational banners

title: Ruling NC decides to hold protest in Delhi over Statehood, constitutional guarantees
content: At legislators’ meet, NC leadership highlights the need “to intensify efforts for restoration of what was taken away from Jammu and Kashmir after the constitutional changes of 2019”

title: Trinamool splits, expelled MLA Ritabrata Banerjee is Leader of Opposition in Bengal Assembly
content: Ritabrata Banerjee claims support of 58 of 80 Trinamool MLAs but appeals to Mamata Banerjee remain ‘main advisor’; the development poses the biggest existential challenge for the Trinamool, which lost to the BJP in the recent Assembly elections

title: Cambodia human trafficking case: ED conducts searches in U.P. and Punjab
content: The ED investigation is based on a First Information Report registered and charge sheets filed by the Delhi police

title: Ministerial hopefuls from Mysuru await expansion amid change of guard in state
content: Except for Yathindra Siddaramaiah, Mysuru district and the surrounding districts of Chamarajanagar, Mandya and Kodagu have been left entirely unrepresented in Shivakumar’s Cabinet

title: Trinamool Congress Crisis Live Updates: After Setbacks, Meeting Called At Mamata Banerjee's House
content: Trinamool Congress Crisis Live Updates: Soon after a debilitating loss at the hands of the Bharatiya Janata Party, rifts within the Trinamool Congress unravelled, with politicians from the party questioning the leadership style of Mamata Banerjee.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump Has New Plans For How America Deals With China
content: China remains the pacing challenge for the US military, but American strategy appears increasingly calibrated to avoid unnecessary escalation

title: 'Don't Have Courage To Take Exam Again': NEET Aspirant Dies By Suicide
content: Relatives say the family had borrowed nearly Rs 3 lakh through a Kisan Credit Card loan and also took financial help from relatives to fund Akanksha's preparation.

title: Jacqueline Fernandez Denies Charges In Rs 200 Crore Extortion Racket Case
content: Fernandez personally appeared before the court as it formally framed charges in the case being probed under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA).

title: Adani Group Partners With Anushkaa Foundation To Treat Clubfoot In 5 States
content: The programme was formally launched at Manyavar Kanshiram Samyukth Chikitsalay and Trauma Centre in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, one of the states carrying the highest burden of clubfoot cases in India.

title: US-Iran Live Updates: Trump Says 'Would Like To Meet' Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei
content: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

title: Honey-Trap Accused Found HIV+ Sparks Major Health Scare In Madhya Pradesh
content: The development has sent shockwaves through the region, with investigators now racing to identify men who may have come into physical contact with the accused woman.

title: Cabinet Okays Rs 9,585 Crore Scheme To Replace Old Trucks, Buses In Delhi-NCR
content: The scheme will benefit approximately 2.07 lakh (1.91 lakh trucks and 16,329 buses) vehicle owners in Delhi-NCR (comprising Delhi, Haryana, Rajasthan, and Uttar Pradesh), the statement said.

title: Opinion: DK Shivakumar Comes With Mastery Of Delhi Networks And Karnataka Grassroots
content: It will be a true test for DK Shivakumar, the eight-time MLA and strongman from Kanakapura, as he navigates an out-of-power Siddaramaiah and manages Karnataka's delicate socio-political equations

title: Exit Route Or Reconciliation? Inside K Annamalai's Meeting With BJP's Top Leadership
content: The BJP leadership is learnt to have assured K Annamalai of support for his proposed statewide public outreach programme, a campaign he believes could help strengthen the party's grassroots presence.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The China Shock 2.0 May Already Be Here
content: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.

title: Stock Market Highlights, Sensex Today: Sensex Closes 300 Points Lower Amid Mixed Global Cues
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: US mulls ending Russian oil sanctions waiver. Decision to benefit India.

title: Delhi Hotel Fire Updates: 21 Killed In Delhi Hotel Fire, PM Modi Announces Rs 2 Lakh Compensation
content: Delhi's Malviya Nagar Hotel Fire Updates: More than 40 persons have been rescued and shifted to nearby hospitals for medical treatment.

title: The rise of beta moms: Why modern mothers are choosing calm over control
content: While not jumping with joy seeing every dog that comes her way (to the bewilderment of the dog owner and the dog), Haimanti fantasizes about fantasy books or classics to read and re-read. That could be the gist of it all, except for the aroma of biryani that beckons; or that idea that's stuck in the head and refuses to go till it's penned down. Read More

title: BCCI likely to not call Suryakumar Yadav for next selection meeting
content: the Indian cricket board (BCCI) is set to get in a huddle to discuss Suryakumar Yadav's future in the team . the current captain may not be asked to attend the next selection meeting for the white-ball tour of Ireland and England later this month .

title: Experiment aborted too soon? How 'sidelined' Annamalai drifted away from BJP in Tamil Nadu
content: the former IPS officer has quit the BJP . he joined BJP in 2020 and made the party visible in the state like never before . sources close to Annamalai claim he has moved on and wants to put his own plans into action .

content: american secretary of state says the united states has ended its campaign of "sustained military strikes" in Iran . he said the operation had succeeded in destroying much of Iran's defence-industrial base . his remarks came as a fragile ceasefire continues to hold despite sporadic violence .
